variants: Koert Welmers currently resides in Merlewood Banks, having been born in Skydrop Township. Employed by Jade Owl Trading, he applies his talents to enhance the company's trading operations. Koert is also the author of the Ivorygate Logic Relay, a significant contribution to the field of technology. For his innovative endeavors, he was awarded the prestigious Wellspring Ring Emblem, recognizing his excellence in the industry.
